visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women appear side-by-side in a split-screen layout, each eating a beige wafer snack that pulls out long, silver, web-like strands from the center. They look at the camera with surprised and focused expressions. (2) A woman in a white top stands before a plain wall, holding a bright orange and white snack package. She shows the package closely to the camera, pointing at the Korean text and the Japanese-style cat illustration. (3) She opens the outer bag and reveals two smaller white square boxes inside. She handles them with her hands, showing the packaging details. (4) The woman struggles slightly as she tears open the paper wrapper, noting the stickiness. She then breaks the square wafer in half, stretching a thick, translucent, shimmering filling between the two pieces. (5) She takes bites of the snack, showing the filling sticking to her teeth and lips. She repeats the stretching action with a different flower-shaped wafer, smiling and gesturing towards her face to show the sticky residue.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: hinako_kagura. [Slogan]: 韓國‧日本爆紅買不到!! 蜘蛛網最中. [Subtitle]: 像蜘蛛網一樣拉絲?. (2) [Variety]: 實驗歐膩. (3) [Subtitle]: 買到了 꿀젤리 모ナカ (蜂蜜拉絲最中). 這個原本產品是日本的. 在韓國也很難買到. 去年一陣子日本也買不到. 後來韓國超商出這個. (4) [Variety]: 完蛋. [Subtitle]: 已經黏住了. 先直接掰開看看. (5) [Subtitle]: 真的像蜘蛛網一樣. 可是味道不像「蜂蜜」. 更像麥芽糖口味!. 挑戰下一個. (6) [Subtitle]: 其實蠻好吃的啦. 但它根本黏在手上掉不下來. (7) [Slogan]: 意外優點之一: 可以拿來做「糖葫蘆唇」.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 1 female collaborator appearing in the intro split-screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white sleeveless top and light makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, neutrally-lit indoor wall, likely a home or simple studio setting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-tempo upbeat electronic pop music starts. A high-energy female voice speaks quickly, expressing curiosity. Crunchy biting sounds are heard as the speaker reacts to the texture. (2) A sharp 'bubble pop' SFX occurs during a scene transition. The speaker explains the snack's origin in Japan and its popularity in Korea with an enthusiastic, informative tone. (3) Sound of plastic crinkling and paper tearing as the package is opened. The voice adopts a playful, slightly comical tone when realizing the snack is stuck to the wrapper. (4) A comic 'boing' and 'sparkle' SFX trigger as the snack is pulled apart, emphasizing the visual stretch. The music continues with a steady beat. The speaker comments on the flavor with rising intonation. (5) Final phase includes more eating sounds and a final summary statement with high vocal arousal. The music remains steady until the very end before a clean cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Intro -> Physical Demonstration -> Tasting/Review -> Closing Insight
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and demonstrate a viral snack known for its extremely stretchy, web-like filling, highlighting its texture and clarifying its actual flavor for viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video presents as a personal review of a trendy product without specific brand promotion links or professional ad tags.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video successfully uses fast-paced editing and sound effects to mirror the playful and sticky nature of the product being reviewed.
